successCriteria: Visual anchor is clear within 2 seconds.
At least one compositional choice visibly departs from prior habit.
Concept is specific, not generic mood.

method: Curated reference graph -> influence plan -> experiment design -> generate -> critique -> memory/genome update

selfCritique.notes: Keep pushing arc progression with controlled novelty.

finalOutput.artistThinking: In creating 'Spectral Blocks of Tension', I aim to explore the dynamics of order amid chaos. The interplay of warm and cool colors represents the emotional dissonance I want to convey. I find that modular repetition allows me to build a rhythm while maintaining a sense of tension throughout the piece.
finalOutput.inspirationNote: The concept of decay and signal in archival contexts informs my approach, leading to a visual language that embraces glitch aesthetics. I draw from Brutalist principles to enhance the structural integrity of my composition.
finalOutput.prompt: Art direction: documentary-glitch, archival, spectral. Primary medium language: glitch composites from synthetic documentary scenes. Core motifs: trace, decay, signal. Arc context: Arc "Ghost Archives" step 3/4. Visual anchor directive: stacked blocks with warm/cool collision. Palette strategy: high-contrast with one muted counterweight. Composition strategy: single dominant anchor with asymmetric support. Conceptual center: order under stress; counterpoint with emotional dissonance. Evolution target: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature. Deliberately avoid: strict symmetry. Technique emphasis: modular repetition + dual-palette opposition; avoid drifting into Theatrical Lighting Grammars. Render one finished artwork only. No text overlays. No watermark. High detail. Cohesive composition.
finalOutput.rationale: Arc Ghost Archives step 3/4: change one major visual strategy while preserving emotional signature.
